if.test: start_date != null and start_date != '' and end_date != null and end_date != ''
search_type != null and search_type != '' and search_text != null and search_text != ''

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N'

${pagingTop} SELECT homepage_id, locker_number, request_number, member_id, member_name, TO_CHAR(request_date,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS request_date, locker_password, reservation_step, reg_no, book_regno, book_isbn, book_name, loan_date, cancel_yn, cancel_reason, cancel_id, cancel_ip, sms_send_yn, sms_send_date, vAccNo, vLoca, seqNo, vUserId, member_phone FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N'
ORDER BY request_number DESC ${pagingBottom}

SELECT homepage_id, locker_number, request_number, member_id, member_name, TO_CHAR(request_date,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS request_date, locker_password, reservation_step, reg_no, book_regno, book_isbn, book_name, loan_date, cancel_yn, cancel_reason, cancel_id, cancel_ip, sms_send_yn, sms_send_date, vAccNo, vLoca, seqNo, vUserId FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N'
ORDER BY request_number DESC

SELECT homepage_id, locker_number, request_number, member_id, member_name, TO_CHAR(request_date,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS request_date, locker_password, reservation_step, reg_no, book_regno, book_isbn, book_name, loan_date, cancel_yn, cancel_reason, cancel_id, cancel_ip, sms_send_yn, sms_send_date, vAccNo, vLoca, seqNo, vUserId FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N'
ORDER BY request_number DESC

${pagingTop} SELECT homepage_id, locker_number, request_number, member_id, member_name, TO_CHAR(request_date,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS request_date, locker_password, reservation_step, reg_no, book_regno, book_isbn, book_name, loan_date, cancel_yn, cancel_reason, cancel_id, cancel_ip, sms_send_yn, sms_send_date, vAccNo, vLoca, seqNo, vUserId, member_phone FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N'
ORDER BY request_number DESC ${pagingBottom}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(request_number),0)+1 FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
INSERT INTO UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION ( homepage_id, locker_number, request_number, member_id, member_name, request_date, locker_password, reservation_step, reg_no, book_regno, book_isbn, book_name, loan_date, cancel_yn, cancel_reason, cancel_id, cancel_ip, sms_send_yn, sms_send_date, member_address, member_email, member_phone, vAccNo, vLoca, seqNo, vUserId ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{locker_number}, #{request_number}, #{member_id}, #{member_name}, SYSDATE, #{locker_password}, '접수', #{reg_no}, #{book_regno}, #{book_isbn}, #{book_name}, #{loan_date}, 'N', #{cancel_reason}, #{cancel_id}, #{cancel_ip}, #{sms_send_yn}, #{sms_send_date}, #{member_address}, #{member_email}, #{member_phone}, #{vAccNo}, #{vLoca}, #{seqNo}, #{vUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(request_date,'YY/MM/DD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YY/MM/DD')

SELECT MIN(locker_number) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_LOCKER_SETTING WHERE locker_number IN ( SELECT locker_number FROM UNTACT_BOOK_LOCKER_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} and locker_type = '도서대출' MINUS SELECT locker_number FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(request_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd') )

SELECT homepage_id, locker_number, request_number, member_id, member_name, TO_CHAR(request_date,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS request_date, locker_password, reservation_step, reg_no, book_regno, book_isbn, book_name, loan_date, cancel_yn, cancel_reason, cancel_id, cancel_ip, sms_send_yn, sms_send_date, member_address, member_email, member_phone, vAccNo, vLoca, seqNo, vUserId FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N' AND member_id = #{member_id} AND member_name = #{member_name} AND request_number = #{request_number}
mapper.update:
UPDATE UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION SET cancel_yn = 'Y', cancel_reason = '관리자취소', cancel_id = #{cancel_id}, cancel_ip = #{cancel_ip}, cancel_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N' AND request_number IN
${i}
mapper.select:
SELECT homepage_id, request_number FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND locker_password = 0 AND cancel_yn = 'N'
AND TO_CHAR(request_date,'yyyy-MM-dd') BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date}
mapper.update: UPDATE UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION SET cancel_yn = 'Y', cancel_reason = #{cancel_reason}, cancel_id = #{cancel_id}, cancel_ip = #{cancel_ip}, cancel_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_id = #{member_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N' AND request_number = #{request_number}
mapper.select: SELECT cancel_reason, cancel_id, cancel_ip, cancel_date FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND TO_CHAR(request_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND cancel_yn = 'N' AND member_id = #{member_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_id = #{member_id}

${pagingTop} SELECT homepage_id, locker_number, request_number, member_id, member_name, TO_CHAR(request_date,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS request_date, locker_password, reservation_step, reg_no, book_regno, book_isbn, book_name, loan_date, cancel_yn, cancel_reason, cancel_id, cancel_ip, sms_send_yn, sms_send_date, vAccNo, vLoca, seqNo, vUserId FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_id = #{member_id} ORDER BY request_number DESC ${pagingBottom}
mapper.update: UPDATE UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION SET cancel_yn = 'Y', cancel_reason = '사용자본인취소', cancel_id = #{member_id}, cancel_ip = #{cancel_ip}, cancel_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_id = #{member_id} AND cancel_yn = 'N' AND request_number = #{request_number}
